description: Ed25519Signer::new(), EcdsaP256Signer::new(), and RsaPssSigner::new() return SecretError::InvalidUri when the backend's algorithm does not match. InvalidUri conventionally signals a malformed or unknown URI, not an algorithm mismatch on an already-constructed backend. Callers that match on InvalidUri to detect bad URIs will also silently catch algorithm mismatches. A new SecretError variant (e.g. AlgorithmMismatch) or at minimum DecodeFailed should be used instead, so error handling is unambiguous.
title: InvalidUri misused for algorithm mismatch error
